.status-bar.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(34, 41, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(34, 41, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(34, 41, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(34, 41, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(14, 210, 247, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(34, 41, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(244, 86, 157, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(27, 33, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
